title: sonchus tener
intro: Sonchus tener, also known as lesser sow thistle or narrow-leaved sow thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe of the sunflower family. It is a perennial plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting liver function. In addition to its medicinal properties, Sonchus tener has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including rheumatism, bronchitis, and skin conditions.
